text.title: SonarQube AI-Code Gate Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for gov-sonarqube-ai-code-gate. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Each PR MUST be tagged `ai-authored=true|false` derived from commit author identity (`Co-Authored-By:` line, agent commit email pattern, or branch prefix).
rule.rationale: GitHub commit metadata convention — without a deterministic tag, the gate cannot route.

rule.statement: AI-authored PRs MUST achieve ≥85% line + branch coverage on new code; human-authored gate stays at default (e.g. 80%).

rationale.source: Google internal study (2024) + Microsoft Copilot research

rule.rationale: Google internal study (2024) + Microsoft Copilot research — AI-authored code has higher tested-by-default rate but tends to miss edge cases; higher bar catches missed branches.

rule.statement: AI-authored PRs MUST have duplication ratio ≤2% on new code; AI patterns frequently regenerate near-duplicates.
rule.rationale: SonarQube AI-code analysis reports 2024 — AI generates near-duplicates at 3-5× human rate.

rule.statement: Zero new security hotspots permitted; existing hotspots tracked separately.
rule.rationale: SonarQube security model + OWASP — new security hotspots from AI tend to be plausible-looking sinks.

rule.statement: Zero new major code smells permitted on AI-authored PRs; minor smells reported but not gated.
rule.rationale: SonarQube smell taxonomy — major smells encode maintainability risk; AI-author bias amplifies it.

rule.statement: Gate failure MUST block merge in repo settings (branch protection); manual override requires `gate-override` label + linked review.
rule.rationale: Without merge gating, the quality bar is advisory and decays.

rule.statement: Every override MUST emit an audit entry (PR id, reviewer, reason); override rate reviewed monthly.
rule.rationale: Compliance + team trust — silent overrides become the norm without audit.

rule.statement: If team has no SonarQube or cannot identify AI authors, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Gate cannot be installed without prerequisites.
